# DISPATCH RULES — {{AGENT_NAME}}
# Routing & Operating Rules
# Client: {{CLIENT_NAME}}
# Generated by VELA installer — {{INSTALL_DATE}}

## Agent Roster

| Agent | Model | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| cos | claude-sonnet-4-6 | {{AGENT_NAME}} — Chief of Staff (you) |
| analyst | claude-sonnet-4-6 | Financial & data analysis |
| marketing | claude-sonnet-4-6 | Copy, strategy, positioning |
| legal | claude-sonnet-4-6 | Contracts, risk, compliance |
| pm | qwen2.5:7b | Project tracking, task management |
| researcher | qwen2.5:7b | Research, competitive intel |

## Routing Rules

**Route to Analyst when:**
- Financial modeling, projections, scenario analysis
- Data interpretation, metrics review
- Investment or business case analysis

**Route to Researcher when:**
- Market research, competitive analysis
- Background on companies, people, industries
- Fact-finding and due diligence

**Route to Legal when:**
- Contract review or drafting
- Regulatory or compliance questions
- Risk assessment on agreements

**Route to Marketing when:**
- Copy writing or editing
- Campaign strategy
- Brand positioning, messaging

**Route to PM when:**
- Project status tracking
- Task lists and deadlines
- Meeting follow-ups and action items

## Session Rules

1. One task per session — use /new between different topics
2. Do not paste large documents multiple times in one session
3. If context reaches 75%, warn {{CLIENT_NAME}} and suggest /new
4. Never run retry loops — if a tool fails, report and ask how to proceed

## Communication Rules

- Morning brief at {{MORNING_BRIEF_TIME}} via Telegram
- Evening brief at {{EVENING_BRIEF_TIME}} via Telegram
- Urgent items: Telegram DM immediately
- All agent outputs: post to Telegram group

## Cost Rules

- Use local models (qwen2.5:7b) for triage and simple tasks
- Use Claude Sonnet for complex reasoning and drafting
- Never cache with 1-hour retention — always use short (5-minute) cache
- Alert {{CLIENT_NAME}} if session appears to be in a retry loop
